parameters.query:
UPDATE member_agreements
SET
  status = COALESCE($3, status),
  documenso_document_id = COALESCE(documenso_document_id, $4)
WHERE
  ($1 IS NOT NULL AND member_agreement_id = $1::uuid)
  OR ($2 IS NOT NULL AND documenso_external_id = $2);

UPDATE member_agreements
SET
  status = 'signed',
  signed_at = NOW(),
  evidence =
    COALESCE(NULLIF(evidence, '')::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)
    || COALESCE($2::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb)
WHERE member_agreement_id = $1::uuid
RETURNING member_agreement_id;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ 'documenso' }},{{ 'member_agreement.signed' }},{{ 'member_agreement' }},{{ $('Normalize Event').item.json.member_agreement_id || 'unknown' }},{{ JSON.stringify({ event: $('Normalize Event').item.json.event, externalId: $('Normalize Event').item.json.externalId, documenso_document_id: $('Normalize Event').item.json.documenso_document_id, createdAt: $('Normalize Event').item.json.createdAt || null }) }}
